domain: Sami yoik vocal tradition (Sápmi, indigenous northern Scandinavia/Finland/Kola): one of Europe's oldest continuous vocal traditions; circular repeating melody-fragments rather than linear narrative; wordless vocables (luohti); breath placed at variable positions within cycle; pentatonic 5-pitch invariant scale; noaidi shamanic ritual use; yoik invokes rather than describes referent (person, animal, landscape).
specific_mechanism: SAMI-JOIK-CYCLIC-MOTIF-BREATH-VARIABLE-PENTATONIC-INVARIANT-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT: LLM topological-defect mechanism with (1) M-cyclic motif library Lmotif: K small repeating melodic fragments cycling continuously; each fragment closed micro-loop in attention-pattern space; (2) variable-breath placement gate g_breath: layer-wise breakpoint where attention-flow inserts breath (zero-output token) at variable positions within cycle, never disrupting cycle's winding number; (3) pentatonic-invariant 5-anchor constraint A_5: 5 canonical attention-anchor directions held invariant per referent-family; (4) wordless-vocable embedding e_luohti: referent-invocation vector depending only on cyclic-motif identity, ignoring token vocabulary; (5) topological-defect penalty L_defect: if referent cycle-winding-number changes between layers, penalise. Differs from R514 ROSEMALING-C-S-STROKE-CURVE-VOCAB-DEFECT (2-primitive C-S vocabulary + winding-number + regional-style + KL-defect) and R526 FAROESE-3-PANEL-DEFECT-LADDER-WINDING (3-panel cellular + 5-motif vocabulary + decrease-ladder winding + misalignment-propagation) and R539 CHILKAT-FORMLINE-3-PRIMITIVE-CUBIST (3-primitive ovoid/U/S + pentagonal + cubist + no-negative-space + twining 2-weft) by M-cyclic motif library + variable-breath placement + pentatonic-5-anchor invariant + wordless-vocable embedding + topological-defect penalty layer-invariance.
llm_application: SAMI-JOIK-CYCLIC-MOTIF-BREATH-VARIABLE-PENTATONIC-INVARIANT-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT LLM mechanism + M-cyclic motif library closed micro-loop attention-pattern + variable-breath placement gate winding-preserving + pentatonic 5-anchor invariant attention-subspace per referent-family + wordless-vocable embedding cyclic-motif identity + topological-defect penalty winding-number layer-invariance. Differs from R514 ROSEMALING (closest — 2-primitive vocab + winding + regional + KL-defect). R526 FAROESE-3-PANEL (closest — 3-panel cellular + winding-number + misalignment). R539 CHILKAT (closest — 3-primitive + cubist + twining). Differs from Persistent Topological Features + Shape of Reasoning Topology + LLMs as Topological Structure + Token Embeddings Manifold by M-cyclic motif library + variable-breath + pentatonic-5-anchor + wordless-vocable + topological-defect penalty. Differs by M-CYCLIC MOTIF LIBRARY + VARIABLE-BREATH PLACEMENT + PENTATONIC-5-ANCHOR INVARIANT + WORDLESS-VOCABLE EMBEDDING + TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT PENALTY.
novelty_claim: Persistent Topological Features 2410.11042 + Shape of Reasoning Topology 2510.20665 + LLMs as Topological Structure 2311.14324 + Token Embeddings Manifold 2504.01002 cover TDA + persistence + topology paradigm. SAMI-JOIK-CYCLIC-MOTIF-BREATH-VARIABLE-PENTATONIC-INVARIANT-TOPOLOGICAL-DEFECT adds (a) M-cyclic motif library + (b) variable-breath placement winding-preserving + (c) pentatonic 5-anchor invariant + (d) wordless-vocable embedding + (e) topological-defect penalty layer-invariance. Recombination — borderline lookup.
